hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by getting the number of upper floors, e.g. let floors = numFloors() - 1

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Build the ground floor at y=1 with an entrance in the middle

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a loop for the upper floors, incrementing y each time

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The roof goes on top of the last floor
